title: NYISO Fuel Mix JSON API
description:
Fuel Mix for NYISO resampled to 5 minute intervals.

💡 The main differentiating element of the NYISO fuel mix relative
to other ISOs is the presence of *Dual Fuel*.

Rather than changing units between multiple fuels in the data as they
switch, *Dual Fuel* units in NYISO represent generators that can run
on either fuel oil or natural gas. In most hours these units will be
running on natural gas, which tends to be cheaper. This is possible
to ascertain from systemwide prices when there is a significant price
spread between fuel oil and natural gas.
